task: Advanced high-value task: Robust Facility Location Candidate Boundary Condition Challenge. Scenario: an expert team is preparing a launch or release decision and needs a calculation-backed recommendation for robust facility location candidate. Embedded packet includes: Records: R1 capacity_units=25 demand_units=44 fixed_cost_k=6; R2 capacity_units=34 demand_units=40 fixed_cost_k=9; R3 capacity_units=20 demand_units=55 fixed_cost_k=5. Remediation options: O1 changes capacity_units by -12% cost=69500; O2 changes demand_units by -18% cost=89500; O3 changes fixed_cost_k by -25% cost=50500; max_budget=114000. Rules and constraints: unmet demand penalty applies when capacity < demand (penalty magnitude not provided - flag as needs_review); choose configuration minimizing expected total cost; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: calculate all derived metrics, classify each record (e.g., capacity shortfall, surplus, fixed-cost impact), evaluate remediation option combinations under the budget constraint, explain the smallest set of values that determines the recommendation, perform sensitivity checks, provide row-level citations to the embedded packet, and mark any ambiguous items as needs_review. Deliverables: facility_location_1.xlsx (spreadsheet with formulas and intermediate values) and expert_memo.md (narrative with explicit assumptions, methodology, sensitivity analysis, and final recommendation table). Do not invent inputs.
